allow: Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); ep=d.get\('episodes',[]\); print\('servers:', len\(ep\)\); [print\(s.get\('server_name'\), '->', len\(s.get\('server_data',[]\)\), 'eps; first sample:', s.get\('server_data',[{}]\)[0]\) for s in ep[:2]]; print\('subtitle key in movie?', 'subtitles' in d.get\('movie',{}\) or 'sub' in d.get\('movie',{}\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('/tmp/ophim.json'\); const ep=d.episodes||[]; console.log\('servers:', ep.length\); ep.slice\(0,2\).forEach\(s => { console.log\(s.server_name, '->', \(s.server_data||[]\).length, 'eps'\); console.log\('first sample keys:', Object.keys\(\(s.server_data||[]\)[0]||{}\)\); console.log\('first sample:', JSON.stringify\(\(s.server_data||[]\)[0]\)\); }\); console.log\('movie keys:', Object.keys\(d.movie||{}\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('D:/personal-project/movie-web/.tmp-ophim.json'\); const ep=d.episodes||[]; console.log\('servers:', ep.length\); ep.slice\(0,2\).forEach\(s => { console.log\(s.server_name, '->', \(s.server_data||[]\).length, 'eps'\); console.log\('first sample:', JSON.stringify\(\(s.server_data||[]\)[0]\)\); }\); console.log\('movie keys:', Object.keys\(d.movie||{}\).join\(','\)\);")
